mapper.select: select sold from lwf_room_stock where room_id = #{roomId} and stock_date = #{date}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into lwf_room_stock (room_id, stock_date, sold) values (#{roomId}, #{date}, 0)
mapper.update: update lwf_room_stock set sold = greatest(0, sold - #{count}) where room_id = #{roomId} and stock_date = #{date}
